title: InvisibleKiller
description:
InvisibleKiller is a lightweight Paper plugin that replaces death messages
when the killer was invisible, preventing players from knowing who killed them.
body:
# InvisibleKiller

**InvisibleKiller** is a lightweight Paper plugin that replaces death messages
when the killer was invisible, preventing players from knowing who killed them.

Perfect for:
- PvP servers
- Assassin / stealth mechanics
- Minigames
- Hardcore & roleplay servers

---

## Features

- Hides killer name when the attacker is invisible
- Different death messages depending on the cause of death
- Multiple message variants (randomized)
- Built-in localization system
- No commands, no permissions
- Extremely lightweight

---

## Languages

- 🇷🇺 Russian
- 🇺🇸 English

---

## Example Messages

> *Player was slain by an unseen force*  
> *Player fell to an invisible blade*  
> *Player died under mysterious circumstances*
